message:
feat(sql): add ROLLUP, CUBE, GROUPING SETS execution

Connect existing parsing/expansion logic to execution for advanced GROUP BY:

ROLLUP(a, b): Hierarchical subtotals
- (a,b), (a), () - drill-down aggregations

CUBE(a, b): All combinations
- (a,b), (a), (b), () - cross-dimensional analysis

GROUPING SETS: Explicit groupings
- Specify exactly which grouping combinations to compute

Implementation:
- Add detection in _executeGroupByAggregation() for advanced GROUP BY
- Implement _executeAdvancedGroupBy() orchestrator
- Implement _executeGroupByForSet() for per-set aggregation
- Add _getAllGroupColumns() and _buildAdvancedGroupByResult() helpers
- NULL values indicate super-aggregate rows (subtotals/totals)
